canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>breathing geometry</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  font-family: monospace;
}
canvas { 
  display: block; 
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let width, height, centerX, centerY;
let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
let targetRotX = 0, targetRotY = 0;
let rotX = 0, rotY = 0;
let rotZ = 0;

function resize() {
  width = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  height = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
  centerX = width / 2;
  centerY = height / 2;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Mouse controls rotation target
document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = (e.clientX / width - 0.5) * 2;
  mouseY = (e.clientY / height - 0.5) * 2;
  targetRotY = mouseX * Math.PI * 0.5;
  targetRotX = mouseY * Math.PI * 0.3;
});

// Golden ratio for icosahedron
const phi = (1 + Math.sqrt(5)) / 2;

// Icosahedron vertices (normalized)
const baseVertices = [
  [-1, phi, 0], [1, phi, 0], [-1, -phi, 0], [1, -phi, 0],
  [0, -1, phi], [0, 1, phi], [0, -1, -phi], [0, 1, -phi],
  [phi, 0, -1], [phi, 0, 1], [-phi, 0, -1], [-phi, 0, 1]
].map(v => {
  const len = Math.sqrt(v[0]*v[0] + v[1]*v[1] + v[2]*v[2]);
  return [v[0]/len, v[1]/len, v[2]/len];
});

// Icosahedron edges (20 triangular faces = 30 edges)
const edges = [
  [0,1], [0,5], [0,7], [0,10], [0,11],
  [1,5], [1,7], [1,8], [1,9],
  [2,3], [2,4], [2,6], [2,10], [2,11],
  [3,4], [3,6], [3,8], [3,9],
  [4,5], [4,9], [4,11],
  [5,9], [5,11],
  [6,7], [6,8], [6,10],
  [7,8], [7,10],
  [8,9],
  [10,11]
];

// Colors
const colors = {
  cyan: '#00ffff',
  pink: '#ff1493',
  purple: '#9400d3',
  white: '#ffffff'
};

function rotateX(point, angle) {
  const cos = Math.cos(angle), sin = Math.sin(angle);
  return [
    point[0],
    point[1] * cos - point[2] * sin,
    point[1] * sin + point[2] * cos
  ];
}

function rotateY(point, angle) {
  const cos = Math.cos(angle), sin = Math.sin(angle);
  return [
    point[0] * cos + point[2] * sin,
    point[1],
    -point[0] * sin + point[2] * cos
  ];
}

function rotateZ(point, angle) {
  const cos = Math.cos(angle), sin = Math.sin(angle);
  return [
    point[0] * cos - point[1] * sin,
    point[0] * sin + point[1] * cos,
    point[2]
  ];
}

function project(point, scale) {
  const perspective = 4;
  const z = point[2] + perspective;
  const factor = perspective / z;
  return {
    x: centerX + point[0] * scale * factor,
    y: centerY + point[1] * scale * factor,
    z: point[2],
    factor: factor
  };
}

function draw(time) {
  // Breathing effect - slow inhale/exhale
  const breathCycle = Math.sin(time * 0.0008) * 0.5 + 0.5; // 0-1 over ~8 seconds
  const breathScale = 1 + breathCycle * 0.15; // 1.0 to 1.15
  
  // Secondary subtle pulse
  const pulse = Math.sin(time * 0.003) * 0.02;
  
  // Smooth rotation towards mouse
  rotX += (targetRotX - rotX) * 0.02;
  rotY += (targetRotY - rotY) * 0.02;
  
  // Auto rotation on Z axis
  rotZ += 0.002;
  
  // Clear with trail effect
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
  
  const scale = Math.min(width, height) * 0.25 * (breathScale + pulse);
  
  // Transform vertices
  const transformed = baseVertices.map(v => {
    let p = [...v];
    p = rotateX(p, rotX);
    p = rotateY(p, rotY);
    p = rotateZ(p, rotZ);
    return p;
  });
  
  // Project to 2D
  const projected = transformed.map(v => project(v, scale));
  
  // Sort edges by average z for depth ordering
  const sortedEdges = edges.map((e, i) => ({
    edge: e,
    z: (transformed[e[0]][2] + transformed[e[1]][2]) / 2
  })).sort((a, b) => a.z - b.z);
  
  // Draw edges
  sortedEdges.forEach(({edge, z}) => {
    const [i, j] = edge;
    const p1 = projected[i];
    const p2 = projected[j];
    
    // Depth-based opacity and color
    const depthFactor = (z + 1.5) / 3; // normalize to 0-1ish
    const alpha = 0.3 + depthFactor * 0.7;
    
    // Color gradient based on depth and breath
    const hue = 280 + depthFactor * 60 + breathCycle * 20; // purple to pink/cyan range
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y);
    ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y);
    
    // Glow effect
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 100%, 70%, ${alpha * 0.3})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 8 * p1.factor;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 100%, 80%, ${alpha * 0.6})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 4 * p1.factor;
    ctx.stroke();
    
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 100%, 95%, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1.5 * p1.factor;
    ctx.stroke();
  });
  
  // Draw vertices
  projected.forEach((p, i) => {
    const depthFactor = (transformed[i][2] + 1.5) / 3;
    const size = (2 + depthFactor * 3) * p.factor;
    const alpha = 0.5 + depthFactor * 0.5;
    
    // Outer glow
    const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(p.x, p.y, 0, p.x, p.y, size * 4);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(0, 255, 255, ${alpha * 0.8})`);
    gradient.addColorStop(0.5, `rgba(255, 20, 147, ${alpha * 0.3})`);
    gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, size * 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fill();
    
    // Core
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${alpha})`;
    ctx.fill();
  });
  
  // Inner nested shape (smaller, offset rotation)
  const innerScale = scale * 0.4;
  const innerTransformed = baseVertices.map(v => {
    let p = [...v];
    p = rotateX(p, -rotX * 0.7);
    p = rotateY(p, -rotY * 0.7);
    p = rotateZ(p, -rotZ * 1.5);
    return p;
  });
  
  const innerProjected = innerTransformed.map(v => project(v, innerScale));
  
  // Draw inner edges (subtle)
  edges.forEach(([i, j]) => {
    const p1 = innerProjected[i];
    const p2 = innerProjected[j];
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(p1.x, p1.y);
    ctx.lineTo(p2.x, p2.y);
    ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(148, 0, 211, ${0.2 + breathCycle * 0.2})`;
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.stroke();
  });
  
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
}

// Start
requestAnimationFrame(draw);
</script>
</body>
</html>
